description: A lightweight debug task for testing the Vegapunk pipeline. Uses synthetic regression data with a simple MLP model to verify the full workflow (idea generation, experiment execution, evaluation) in approximately 5 seconds per run.
goal: Improve the MLP regression model's performance on synthetic data. The baseline uses a simple 2-layer MLP. Explore architectural improvements, regularization techniques, or training optimizations.
dataset: Synthetic regression dataset with 1000 samples, 20 features, generated using sklearn.datasets.make_regression
baseline: 2-layer MLP (64->32 hidden units) with ReLU activation, trained for 100 epochs
constraints: Must maintain the same train/test split for fair comparison
